title: DPCC Delhi Pollution Control Board Online Form 2026
description: DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026: Notification, Vacancy, Eligibility & Syllabus Post Date: 18-05-2026 Short Description : Delhi Pollution Control Committee has released a notification for the DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026, with a total of 150 vacancies. Candidates must have a Bachelor Degree in Civil / Enviromental / Chemical / Electrical / Mechanical / ECE / Biomedical Engg / Water Resources / Remote Sensing / GIS / Hydrology or Equivalent passed from any recognized university.
